nodes.name: 绿篱莺
nodes.summary: 绿篱莺（Hippolais icterina）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如绿篱莺。

nodes.name: 绿篱莺
nodes.summary: 绿篱莺（Icterine warbler，学名 Hippolais icterina），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联5个分布地点节点。
nodes.shortSummary: 綠籬鶯（學名：Hippolais icterina）是舊世界鶯科的一種，屬於籬鶯屬（Hippolais）。該鳥類繁殖於歐洲大陸，除了西南部地區（由其西部對應種——歌蘺鶯取代）。綠籬鶯是候鳥，冬季遷徙至撒哈拉以南非洲過冬。 描述 綠籬鶯是一種相對較大的鶯類，具有大頭、寬基喙和長翅…

nodes.name: 甘伯爾
nodes.summary: 甘伯爾是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括绿篱莺，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is migratory, wintering in sub-Saharan Africa

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The icterine warbler has the most northerly and widespread distribution of the four Hippolais species; its breeding range extends from northern France and Norway through most of northern and eastern Europe, south as far as the northern Balkans mountains and Crimea mountains eastwards in a narrowing band to the River Ob. It has bred in Scotland recently but it is normally a passage migrant in Great Britain and Ireland. There is a 2022 record of the icterine warbler from Gambell, Alaska, and it was also documented in the state the following year. It is a migratory species and the entire population winters in sub-Saharan Africa, mainly south of the equator
